systems.system_notes: Cross-pin femoral fixation platform within the DePuy Synthes Mitek sports medicine portfolio for ACL reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes sports medicine materials describe dedicated instrumentation for RIGIDFIX graft fixation workflow.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the transverse cross-pin fixation construct used in ACL reconstruction.
Official sports medicine materials describe the guide-frame workflow used for cross-pin placement.
Official sports medicine materials describe the dedicated sleeve/instrument workflow for RIGIDFIX insertion.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the RIGIDFIX fixation family and instrumentation context, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper ordering guide or product-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
